examples: The great event of the year is the National Eisteddfod.
The Royal National Eisteddfod is a celebration of Welsh culture, and in particular of the Welsh language.
Cardigan Castle, the site of the first eisteddfod in 1176, is currently undergoing a major renovation.
The continuing row over the future of Welsh communities dominated this year's National Eisteddfod at Denbigh.
The 25 mile route started at the Old Eisteddfod Field at the Millennium Coastal Park.
